channel.title: Hopvine Pub — Wednesday Open Mic
channel.description: Upcoming events for Hopvine Pub — Wednesday Open Mic

item.title: Hopvine Pub — Wednesday Open Mic
item.description:
Wednesday, March 25, 2026 at 9 PM

Location: 507 15th Avenue E, Seattle

Casual singer/songwriter-focused open mic hosted by Eric Miller. All welcome.

Event details
